subtitle: Sign in to your account
missing_credentials: Please enter your username and password
no_account_message: Your SSO identity is not linked to any account. Please ask an administrator to create one for you.
error_auth_failed_message: SSO authentication failed. Please retry or contact an administrator.
error_account_disabled_message: Your account is disabled. Please contact an administrator.
error_account_pending_message: Your account is pending admin review. Please try again later.
error_sso_message: An error occurred during SSO sign-in. Please retry or contact an administrator.
error_default_message: An error occurred during sign-in. Please retry or contact an administrator.
redirect_pending_body: You will be sent to your identity provider in a moment…
